text: The $2k/mo number only works on owners who already know their hourly cost of a missed call. Most do not. The real sale is tracking the first ten missed calls, then pricing against that.
For most SMB owners it is not the tech. It is the fear of an agent saying something off-brand to a regular customer. Give them a kill switch on the dashboard and the objection drops.
The MENA parallel holds. Distribution beats product once the underlying tech is commoditised. Whoever wins the local trust layer for small business agents wins the category.
